steps.title: Read circle information
steps.content:
Circle $M$ has equation $(x-5)^2+(y-8)^2=9$, so its center is $(5,8)$ and its radius is
$$\sqrt{9}=3$$

steps.title: Double the radius
steps.content:
Circle $P$ has the same center and twice the radius of circle $M$.
$$2\cdot3=6$$
The equation must use $r^2=6^2=36$ with center $(5,8)$. The answer is B.
